title: SEAKNOT - First steps towards a SA roadmap
author: Herranz, Luis Enrique
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Presentation of the SEAKNOT project at the CSARP Meeting in June 2023 CSARP (Cooperative Severe Accident Research Program) is an international program on severe accident phenomenological research and code development activities organized by the US NRC.
